name: thread-memory
description: Persistent local memory and context continuity for AI coding agents, with one-command installation for Codex, Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and OpenCode.

interface.shortDescription: Persist durable context for each AI agent conversation
interface.longDescription: Thread Memory gives coding agents a durable README per thread or workspace, so they can read current context before work and update progress before finishing. It helps preserve continuity across context compaction, restarts, long gaps, and OpenAI-compatible API proxy or relay setups.
defaultPrompt: Use Thread Memory for this session.
Resume this project with durable context.
